H1_fee_bypass.evidence: calculate_flash_loan_fees reads only flash_loan_fee_sf, referral_fee_bps, has_referrer -- not cumulative_borrow_rate, borrowed_amount, or total_available

H2_obligation_race.evidence: Flash-loan path does not interact with obligations; requires executable test to verify cross-instruction state interaction

H3_multi_flash.evidence: flash_borrow_checks_internal scans forward in same transaction only; cross-block flash-loans are independent

H4_fee_precision.evidence: BorrowTooSmall guard prevents fee >= amount; minimum_fee = 1u64 enforced

H5_token2022.evidence: SPL Token-2022 transfer fee extension may double-charge; requires Token-2022 reserve setup and executable test
